codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3011'
path = '/search'
params = {
    'clientId': 'qsl-integration-test',
    'filter': 'documentType:Actor',
    'excludeCompendiums': 'true'
}
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.get(
    url,
    params=params,
    headers={
        'x-api-key': 'c2f25bfd78a7fe3e7b3294dbf5f026285989fa0d7f7b73b2108305e68f64b796'
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)

  🔤filter=documentType:Actor🔤 ➡️ filter

  💭 Build HTTP request

  💭 Connect and send
  🍺 🆕📞 host port❗ ➡️ socket
  🍺 💬 socket 📇 request❗❗
  
  💭 Read and print response

  😀 🍺 🔡 data❗❗
  
  💭 Close socket
